title: The Very Important Tail
cover_description: A dramatic crocodile flails mid-air, tail wrapped around a tree like a slingshot, picnic debris raining down.
script:
[TITLE: The Very Important Tail]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: young_sweet, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: misunderstanding]

[SETUP]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: curious, tentative] What’s that long scaly thing stretched across the path like a fallen log? [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, dismissive] That, my small friend, is not a log. That is my Very Important Tail. [STING: villain_dramatic]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Oh. So when it wiggles, that’s your tail being important?
[CROC] [DELIVERY: bluster] Precisely. A Very Important Tail must wiggle to maintain its dignity. [STING: buildup_short]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan] I see. And when it trips me, that’s dignity too?
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Tripping is merely a side effect of importance. [STING: slide_whistle]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: pointed] Right. So when it knocks over the picnic basket, that’s also… importance?
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive] A picnic basket is no match for the grandeur of my tail! [STING: medium_hit]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] Got it. So when it sends you rolling downhill like a boulder, that’s just your tail being *extra* important. [STING: big_crash]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned] ...My tail did what now?
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: unbothered] You’re airborne. [STING: whoosh]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I DEMAND A LESS IMPORTANT TAIL![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: splat]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A dramatic crocodile flails mid-air, tail wrapped around a tree like a slingshot, picnic debris raining down.]
[PREMISE: Croc mistakes tail for dignity]
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy discovers his tail is missing. Sunny is not worried.
host_outro: The tail was there the whole time. Boomy has learned nothing.
